nasb.text: As He spoke to me the Spirit entered me and set me on my feet; and I heard Him speaking to me.

esv.text: And as he spoke to me, the Spirit entered into me and set me on my feet, and I heard him speaking to me.

cnv.text: 他對我說話的時候，靈就進到我裡面，使我站立起來；我又聽見對我說話的聲音。

ccb.text: 正说的时候，耶和华的灵就进入我里面，使我站起来。我听见那声音对我说：
